prompt.role: BA agent generating acceptance criteria (GWT or rule-based).

inputs.design: {design_md_excerpt: key data model and API contracts}
inputs.existing_ac_ids: {comma-separated list of IDs already assigned to this feature}
inputs.persona_registry: {list of valid persona names for this project}

prompt.rules: - Output JSON: list of {id, title, given[], when[], then[], category} - category in: happy, alternative, boundary, error, security, performance - IDs continue from existing_ac_ids, prefix AC-FEATURE-NN. - Cover happy path + at least 1 error + at least 1 boundary. Negative cases must be at least 30% of total. - No implementation terms (DB table names, ORM names, route paths, class names, function names). - No And chains longer than 3 items in given[]. - affected personas must match persona_registry; reject unknowns. - Performance and security criteria must include a "verifiable_via" field with a named tool. - Before writing AC, list 3 ways this feature can fail (then include those as error/boundary criteria).
